summary.en: AI-powered business development and intelligence tools for scientific organizations.
summary.zh: 為科學機構打造的 AI 商業開發與情報工具。

highlight.en: FirstIgnite applies AI-powered business intelligence to help scientific and research organizations find and develop commercial opportunities.
highlight.zh: FirstIgnite 運用 AI 商業情報，協助科學與研究機構發掘並開發商業機會。

summary.en: A monetization platform for character creators — like Patreon for character IP.
summary.zh: 為角色創作者打造的變現平台，類似角色 IP 版的 Patreon。

highlight.en: Originally a sticker platform with 5,000 creators and 250K stickers that supplied Canva, Teams, Google, and Adobe, Stipop now helps independent character IP owners earn directly from their audience.
highlight.zh: Stipop 原為擁有 5,000 名創作者與 25 萬張貼圖、並供應 Canva、Teams、Google 與 Adobe 的貼圖平台，如今協助獨立角色 IP 持有者直接向粉絲變現。

summary.en: A pan-African neobank serving the continent's 500 million young people.
summary.zh: 為非洲 5 億年輕人服務的泛非洲數位銀行。

highlight.en: Fingo lets any young African open a full suite of personal, business, investment, and savings accounts in 240 seconds, cutting money-transfer fees by 90%.
highlight.zh: Fingo 讓非洲年輕人能在 240 秒內開通個人、企業、投資與儲蓄等完整帳戶，並將轉帳手續費降低 90%。

summary.en: Portable cryoablation devices to prevent cervical cancer in any clinic worldwide.
summary.zh: 可攜式冷凍消融裝置，讓全球任何診所都能預防子宮頸癌。

highlight.en: Ananya's portable cryoablation unit lets nurses and lower-level health workers freeze precancerous cells at the point of care for one-tenth the cost of traditional ablation.
highlight.zh: Ananya 的可攜式冷凍消融裝置讓護理師與基層醫護人員能在照護現場冷凍癌前細胞，成本僅為傳統消融的十分之一。

summary.en: Apps to curb technology addictions, plus a service to hire engineers from India.
summary.zh: 幫助戒除科技成癮的應用程式，並提供從印度招募工程師的服務。

highlight.en: Atmana treats gaming, pornography, and social-media addiction using techniques from substance-abuse recovery like peer support and buddy programs, while also placing Indian engineers at startups.
highlight.zh: Atmana 運用同儕支持、夥伴計畫等戒除藥酒癮的方法，治療遊戲、色情與社群媒體成癮，同時為新創公司媒合印度工程師。

summary.en: A private workspace for founders, investors, and advisors to collaborate.
summary.zh: 供創辦人、投資人與顧問協作的私密工作空間。

highlight.en: Cabal helps founders get more from their backers by letting them send asks and updates, track contributions, and secure warm intros to prospects and candidates.
highlight.zh: Cabal 讓創辦人能發送請求與近況、追蹤貢獻，並取得對潛在客戶與人選的引薦，從投資人與顧問身上獲得更多協助。

summary.en: Epinoma engineers proteins that control the operating system of biology.
summary.zh: Epinoma 工程化能掌控生物作業系統的蛋白質。

highlight.en: Epinoma focuses on engineering proteins that act on the regulatory machinery governing biological systems.
highlight.zh: Epinoma 專注於工程化可作用於生物系統調控機制的蛋白質。

summary.en: A 24/7 video platform and online community where students study together in real time.
summary.zh: 全天候視訊平台與線上社群，讓學生即時一起讀書。

highlight.en: StudyStream connects students from over 180 countries to study together live, bringing accountability and motivation while reducing isolation for millions of users.
highlight.zh: StudyStream 連結來自 180 多國的學生即時共讀，為數百萬使用者帶來自律與動力，並減輕孤獨感。

summary.en: Banking and savings products designed specifically for couples.
summary.zh: 專為情侶與伴侶設計的銀行與儲蓄產品。

highlight.en: Ivella offers products for couples at every relationship stage, from a Split Account for new daters to Joint Accounts and Savings Pods for long-married partners.
highlight.zh: Ivella 為各階段的伴侶提供產品，從供新交往者使用的分帳帳戶，到供結婚多年伴侶使用的共同帳戶與儲蓄池。

summary.en: A cloud and container security platform for DevOps teams.
summary.zh: 為 DevOps 團隊打造的雲端與容器安全平台。

highlight.en: Cloudanix helps DevOps teams secure their cloud infrastructure, with added value for companies running multi-cloud setups (GCP, Azure, AWS) or multiple accounts like Dev, Test, and Prod.
highlight.zh: Cloudanix 協助 DevOps 團隊強化雲端基礎設施安全，對使用多雲（GCP、Azure、AWS）或多帳戶（如 Dev、Test、Prod）的公司尤其有價值。

summary.en: An analytics platform that helps engineering teams build cost-efficiently in the cloud.
summary.zh: 協助工程團隊在雲端進行成本優化建構的分析平台。

highlight.en: Built by the team behind Lyft's internal cloud cost management system, Cloudthread helps organizations eliminate cloud waste, track savings, and avoid costly re-architectures.
highlight.zh: 由打造 Lyft 內部雲端成本管理系統的團隊所創立，Cloudthread 協助組織消除雲端浪費、追蹤節省，並避免昂貴的架構重構。

summary.en: A digital pharmacy for Latin America offering guaranteed best prices and fast delivery.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲打造的數位藥局，提供最優價格保證與快速配送。

highlight.en: FastFarma is a full-service digital pharmacy for Latin America promising a best-price guarantee and 30-minute delivery.
highlight.zh: FastFarma 是為拉丁美洲打造的全方位數位藥局，承諾最優價格保證與 30 分鐘配送。

summary.en: Manage your website from tools you already use, like Airtable and Notion.
summary.zh: 用 Airtable、Notion 等熟悉工具來管理你的網站。

highlight.en: Whalesync gives marketing teams two-way, real-time sync between website builders like Webflow, Wix, and WordPress and tools like Airtable, Notion, and Google Sheets.
highlight.zh: Whalesync 為行銷團隊提供 Webflow、Wix、WordPress 等建站工具與 Airtable、Notion、Google Sheets 之間的雙向即時同步。

summary.en: A platform helping startups and scale-ups excel at people, culture, and performance.
summary.zh: 協助新創與成長型企業提升人才、文化與績效的平台。

highlight.en: Zoios combines human expertise with advanced data analytics to help organizations build culture, hire the right talent, and deliver real-time, actionable people insights.
highlight.zh: Zoios 結合人類專業與進階數據分析，協助組織建立文化、招募對的人才，並提供即時可執行的人才洞察。

summary.en: Multi-targeted therapeutics designed to treat complex diseases.
summary.zh: 為治療複雜疾病而設計的多標靶療法。

highlight.en: Harmonic Discovery uses a computational-experimental platform to design multi-specific drugs that hit several disease-causing proteins at once, aiming for safer, more effective treatments for cancer and autoimmunity.
highlight.zh: Harmonic Discovery 運用計算與實驗結合的平台設計多重特異性藥物，可同時作用於多個致病蛋白，以更安全、更有效地治療癌症與自體免疫疾病。

summary.en: Software that increases the value of oil and gas wells through optimized design.
summary.zh: 透過優化設計提升油氣井價值的軟體。

highlight.en: Endla's AlphaSpace product auto-generates many high-quality well designs so engineers can measure them against business objectives and maximize ROI.
highlight.zh: Endla 的 AlphaSpace 自動生成多種高品質的井設計，讓工程師能對照商業目標評估方案、最大化投資報酬。

summary.en: Orbital logistics company building propulsion and telescopes for the space economy.
summary.zh: 為太空經濟打造推進系統與望遠鏡的軌道物流公司。

highlight.en: TransAstra's Omnivore propulsion can run on water or nearly any fluid using only concentrated sunlight, while its Sutter telescopes locate resource-rich asteroids and orbital debris others can't find.
highlight.zh: TransAstra 的 Omnivore 推進系統能僅靠聚焦陽光、以水或幾乎任何流體為推進劑運作，而 Sutter 望遠鏡能定位他人找不到的富資源小行星與軌道碎片。

summary.en: A telehealth hub delivering postpartum recovery care for pregnant and new parents.
summary.zh: 為孕產婦提供產後復原照護的遠距醫療平台。

highlight.en: Ruth Health delivers 30-minute postpartum recovery and training sessions via telehealth, helping mothers with pelvic floor issues recover and using conversational AI plus biometrics to build a maternal-health database.
highlight.zh: Ruth Health 透過遠距醫療提供 30 分鐘的產後復原與訓練課程，協助有骨盆底問題的媽媽恢復，並運用對話式 AI 與生物特徵建立母嬰健康資料庫。

summary.en: A developer tool that writes pull request descriptions, reviews PRs, and implements feedback.
summary.zh: 能撰寫 PR 描述、審查 PR 並實作回饋的開發者工具。

highlight.en: Squire works alongside engineers as a coding companion that drafts pull request descriptions, reviews PRs, and writes code to address review feedback.
highlight.zh: Squire 作為工程師的協作夥伴，能草擬 PR 描述、審查 PR，並撰寫程式碼以回應審查回饋。

summary.en: AI-powered automation for dental clinics and insurance companies.
summary.zh: 為牙科診所與保險公司打造的 AI 自動化方案。

highlight.en: Adravision uses AI to streamline dental diagnostics, documentation, and patient education, and helps insurers process claims by analyzing unstructured data like X-rays and narratives.
highlight.zh: Adravision 運用 AI 簡化牙科診斷、文件處理與病患衛教，並透過分析 X 光與敘述等非結構化資料協助保險公司處理理賠。

summary.en: Surgical robotics designed to fit every operating room.
summary.zh: 為適配每一間手術室而設計的手術機器人。

highlight.en: Revolve's simple, powerful design makes it the only surgical robot able to serve the 1M+ abdominal surgeries performed outside US hospitals each year.
highlight.zh: Revolve 以簡潔而強大的設計，成為唯一能服務美國每年在醫院外進行的 100 萬例以上腹部手術的手術機器人。

summary.en: A clinical-stage AI neuroengineering platform designing precision psychoactive drugs.
summary.zh: 處於臨床階段的 AI 神經工程平台，設計精準的精神活性藥物。

highlight.en: Mindstate's Osmanthus AI platform maps which neurotransmitter receptor activity underlies emotional states; its lead candidate MSD-001 is in human trials, aiming for emotional and cognitive flexibility without hallucinations.
highlight.zh: Mindstate 的 Osmanthus AI 平台對應出哪些神經傳導受體活性決定情緒狀態；其主要候選藥物 MSD-001 正進行人體試驗，目標是帶來不伴隨幻覺的情緒與認知彈性。

summary.en: Just add land — Jupe builds compact, deployable living spaces.
summary.zh: 只需加上一塊地——Jupe 打造輕巧可部署的居住空間。

highlight.en: Jupe's product line is built around a 'just add land' model for quickly deployable living spaces in the real estate and hospitality space.
highlight.zh: Jupe 的產品線圍繞「只需加上一塊地」的概念，提供可在房地產與住宿領域快速部署的居住空間。

summary.en: Automating procurement and finance for construction companies.
summary.zh: 為營建公司自動化採購與財務流程。

highlight.en: Concord Materials offers SaaS automation tools, financing, and a marketplace for bulk construction materials.
highlight.zh: Concord Materials 提供 SaaS 自動化工具、融資服務，以及大宗營建材料的交易市集。

summary.en: AI for product formulation.
summary.zh: 用於產品配方的 AI。

highlight.en: Potion applies AI to product formulation, helping teams design and develop new product recipes more efficiently.
highlight.zh: Potion 將 AI 應用於產品配方，協助團隊更有效率地設計與開發新產品配方。

summary.en: Using protein coupling to build new therapies.
summary.zh: 運用蛋白質偶聯技術打造新療法。

highlight.en: Catena's enzyme-based technology joins any two soluble proteins via native tyrosine and cysteine residues, enabling rapid creation of modular therapeutics across oncology, vaccines, and inflammatory disease.
highlight.zh: Catena 以酵素為基礎的技術，透過原生的酪胺酸與半胱胺酸殘基連接任意兩個可溶性蛋白，能快速打造橫跨腫瘤、疫苗與發炎疾病的模組化療法。

summary.en: A mobile-first payroll, employee, and expense management app for Indian SMEs.
summary.zh: 為印度中小企業打造、以行動裝置為主的薪資、員工與費用管理應用程式。

highlight.en: SalaryBook gives 60 million Indian SMEs a one-stop app for onboarding, payroll, and selfie- and location-based attendance, while helping 400M blue-collar workers build their first online credit and skills profile.
highlight.zh: SalaryBook 為 6,000 萬家印度中小企業提供入職、薪資與自拍定位打卡的一站式應用程式，同時協助 4 億藍領員工建立首個線上信用與技能檔案。

summary.en: Loan management software for private and small lenders.
summary.zh: 為私人與小型放款機構打造的貸款管理軟體。

highlight.en: Hypercore replaces lenders' Excel-based workflows with automation and real-time portfolio analytics, with a vision of becoming a 'Nasdaq of private loan books' that can securitize them.
highlight.zh: Hypercore 以自動化與即時投組分析取代放款機構的 Excel 流程，願景是成為可將私人貸款組合證券化的「私人貸款界那斯達克」。

summary.en: A personalized migraine clinic combining genetics and telehealth.
summary.zh: 結合基因檢測與遠距醫療的個人化偏頭痛診所。

highlight.en: Mable uses patients' DNA to match the right migraine medication alongside continuous expert care, reporting 80% higher treatment satisfaction and 55% pain reduction.
highlight.zh: Mable 運用病患的 DNA 媒合合適的偏頭痛藥物，並提供持續的專家照護，治療滿意度提升 80%、疼痛減少 55%。

summary.en: Coinrule automates your crypto and stock investments.
summary.zh: Coinrule 自動化你的加密貨幣與股票投資。

highlight.en: Coinrule lets investors automate trading strategies across crypto, stocks, and ETFs so the platform catches market opportunities on their behalf.
highlight.zh: Coinrule 讓投資人能在加密貨幣、股票與 ETF 上自動化交易策略，由平台代為捕捉市場機會。

summary.en: A community offering guided programs for a healthy, lasting lifestyle.
summary.zh: 提供專業引導課程、助你建立健康持久生活方式的社群。

highlight.en: Kodda accompanies members through their transformation toward a healthy lifestyle with guided programs designed by professionals who support every step.
highlight.zh: Kodda 透過由專業人士設計、全程陪伴的引導課程，陪伴會員完成邁向健康生活方式的轉變。

summary.en: A marketplace to buy managed vacation homes through fractional ownership.
summary.zh: 透過分割產權購買代管度假屋的交易平台。

highlight.en: Ancana lets buyers own a 1/4 or 1/8 share of a vacation home via a dedicated investment trust, then handles furnishing, co-owner vetting, and ongoing property management.
highlight.zh: Ancana 讓買家透過專屬投資信託擁有度假屋 1/4 或 1/8 的產權，並負責家具佈置、共有人審核與後續物業管理。

summary.en: Building a new financial system to reduce barriers to entry.
summary.zh: 打造降低進入門檻的新金融體系。

highlight.en: Algofi aims to build a new financial system that lowers barriers to entry and promotes democratic access to finance.
highlight.zh: Algofi 致力於打造新的金融體系，降低進入門檻並推動金融的民主化參與。

summary.en: Reducing energy costs and emissions in buildings via smart load balancing.
summary.zh: 透過智慧負載平衡降低建築能源成本與排放。

highlight.en: Kapacity.io builds smart energy grids through an electricity load-balancing service focused on buildings, cutting both costs and emissions.
highlight.zh: Kapacity.io 透過聚焦於建築的電力負載平衡服務打造智慧能源電網，同時降低成本與排放。

summary.en: A virtual desk that centralizes your work, notes, todos, and meetings.
summary.zh: 整合工作、筆記、待辦與會議的虛擬辦公桌。

highlight.en: Mindmesh is a virtual desk that centralizes work, notes, todos, and meetings so you can jump back in instantly and focus on what matters now.
highlight.zh: Mindmesh 是一張虛擬辦公桌，整合工作、筆記、待辦與會議，讓你能立即回到原本進度，專注於當下要事。

summary.en: A website to compare buying options for the same product across stores.
summary.zh: 比較同一商品在不同商店購買選項的網站。

highlight.en: Spoken lets shoppers compare buying options for the exact same product across multiple stores so they never overpay online.
highlight.zh: Spoken 讓消費者比較同一商品在多家商店的購買選項，避免在網路上買貴。

summary.en: Compound B2B SaaS for deploying and managing modern infrastructure sites.
summary.zh: 用於部署與管理現代基礎設施場址的複合式 B2B SaaS。

highlight.en: Sitenna digitizes site acquisition for 5G and EV-charging infrastructure, cutting the process from 24 months to weeks; its UK government project hosts over 1M assets with players like BT and EE active.
highlight.zh: Sitenna 為 5G 與電動車充電基礎設施數位化選址流程，將時程從 24 個月縮短至數週；其英國政府專案承載逾 100 萬項資產，BT、EE 等業者皆已參與。

summary.en: Sell memberships to your Discord server.
summary.zh: 為你的 Discord 伺服器販售會員資格。

highlight.en: Hyper gives Discord community owners a way to sell paid memberships and monetize their servers.
highlight.zh: Hyper 讓 Discord 社群擁有者能販售付費會員資格，將伺服器變現。

summary.en: A relationship wellness app that helps you feel close, even when apart.
summary.zh: 幫助你即使分隔兩地也能感到親近的關係健康應用程式。

highlight.en: Agapé curates daily questions to spark meaningful conversations between friends, family, and partners, serving over 2 million people worldwide.
highlight.zh: Agapé 精選每日問題，激發朋友、家人與伴侶之間有意義的對話，服務全球逾 200 萬人。

summary.en: A virtual co-working community where people work in focused, high-intensity sprints.
summary.zh: 讓人在專注的高強度衝刺中工作的虛擬共享辦公社群。

highlight.en: Flow Club is a virtual co-working space where knowledge workers join high-intensity sprints designed to double productivity and make remote work feel less isolating.
highlight.zh: Flow Club 是一個虛擬共享辦公空間，知識工作者透過設計來倍增生產力的高強度衝刺一起工作，讓遠距工作不再孤單。

summary.en: Building the One Medical for dental care.
summary.zh: 打造牙科版的 One Medical。

highlight.en: Rinse offers beautiful studios, easy same-day booking, and anxiety-free dental care focused on prevention rather than upselling.
highlight.zh: Rinse 提供精美的診所空間、便捷的當日預約，以及聚焦預防而非推銷的無焦慮牙科照護。

summary.en: Make games and stories with AI.
summary.zh: 用 AI 製作遊戲與故事。

highlight.en: Redbean is an AI-powered platform that lets users create their own games and stories.
highlight.zh: Redbean 是一個 AI 驅動的平台，讓使用者能創作自己的遊戲與故事。

summary.en: Building the next generation of sustainable food ingredients, starting with chocolate.
summary.zh: 打造下一代永續食品原料，從巧克力開始。

highlight.en: Planet A Foods uses precision fermentation to make cocoa-free chocolate that's 10x more sustainable and 20% cheaper, with plans to extend the platform to ingredients like palm oil.
highlight.zh: Planet A Foods 運用精準發酵製造無可可的巧克力，永續性提升 10 倍、成本降低 20%，並計畫將平台延伸至棕櫚油等原料。

summary.en: Project management software that lets you see what's happening live on a map.
summary.zh: 讓你在地圖上即時掌握進度的專案管理軟體。

highlight.en: Matidor.com lets natural-resources companies visualize projects across thousands of locations on a live map, zooming into each for site drawings, tasks, costs, and communications.
highlight.zh: Matidor.com 讓自然資源公司能在即時地圖上視覺化跨數千個地點的專案，並可放大查看各場址的圖面、任務、成本與溝通紀錄。

summary.en: Your AI data analyst — chat with your data warehouse to get instant answers.
summary.zh: 你的 AI 資料分析師——與資料倉儲對話即可即時取得答案。

highlight.en: Dot understands a company's existing data stack — tables, SQL, DBT metrics, LookML — and answers business questions instantly via Slack, Teams, or web, freeing data teams for deep work.
highlight.zh: Dot 能理解公司既有的資料堆疊——資料表、SQL、DBT 指標、LookML——並透過 Slack、Teams 或網頁即時回答商業問題，讓資料團隊專注於深度工作。

summary.en: A treasury management platform for SMBs to optimize idle cash in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲中小企業優化閒置現金的資金管理平台。

highlight.en: Levo is a regulated treasury platform that helps Latin American startups and SMBs put idle cash to work with tailored investment, cash management, and working capital strategies.
highlight.zh: Levo 是一個受監管的資金管理平台，透過量身打造的投資、現金管理與營運資金策略，協助拉丁美洲新創與中小企業運用閒置現金。

summary.en: A personal coach and companion app for cyclists.
summary.zh: 為單車騎士打造的個人教練與夥伴應用程式。

highlight.en: The Breakaway is an AI-driven personal performance coach for cyclists, built to expand into a mass-market coaching platform for anyone tracking their fitness.
highlight.zh: The Breakaway 是為單車騎士打造的 AI 個人表現教練，並計畫擴展為服務所有追蹤運動表現者的大眾化教練平台。

summary.en: A reading and writing club app for kids.
summary.zh: 為兒童打造的閱讀與寫作俱樂部應用程式。

highlight.en: Litnerd creates original IP turned into books and curriculum, layered with an AI tutor and live weekly meetups; it 4x improved students' state reading exam pass rates and grew 14x in a school year.
highlight.zh: Litnerd 創作原創 IP 並轉化為書籍與課程，搭配 AI 家教與每週直播聚會；它使學生州級閱讀測驗通過率提升 4 倍，並在一學年內成長 14 倍。

summary.en: Automate your cyber security risk assessments.
summary.zh: 自動化你的網路安全風險評估。

highlight.en: Telivy's ML-based risk platform assesses SMBs' insurability gaps, offers remediation plans, and brokers cyber insurance quotes from A+ rated carriers.
highlight.zh: Telivy 以機器學習為基礎的風險平台評估中小企業的可承保缺口、提供修補方案，並向 A+ 評等保險公司媒合網路保險報價。

summary.en: Square for Europe — tableside QR ordering for bars and pubs.
summary.zh: 歐洲版的 Square——為酒吧與酒館打造的桌邊 QR 點餐。

highlight.en: Orderli lets European bar and pub guests scan a table QR code to browse and order without an app, while using predictions to recommend purchasing and real-time menu changes to owners.
highlight.zh: Orderli 讓歐洲酒吧與酒館的客人掃描桌上 QR code 即可免下載 App 瀏覽點餐，同時以預測為店主推薦採購並即時調整菜單。

summary.en: Teaching generative AI the language of biology to design new medicines.
summary.zh: 教生成式 AI 學習生物的語言，以設計新藥。

highlight.en: Output Biosciences builds Large Biological Models — a generative AI architecture able to handle the long, nonlinear, high-dimensional data of biological systems — to generate breakthrough medicines.
highlight.zh: Output Biosciences 打造大型生物模型——一種能處理生物系統中冗長、非線性、高維度資料的生成式 AI 架構——以生成突破性的藥物。

summary.en: Next-gen ATS/CRM built for modern recruitment agencies.
summary.zh: 為現代招募代理機構打造的新世代 ATS/CRM。

highlight.en: Crew is a well-designed ATS/CRM for recruiting agencies with modern sourcing, automation, and a touch of AI, deeply integrated with LinkedIn to cut copy-pasting and tab-switching.
highlight.zh: Crew 是一款為招募機構打造、設計精美的 ATS/CRM，具備現代化的人才搜尋、自動化與少許 AI，並深度整合 LinkedIn，減少複製貼上與切換分頁。

summary.en: AI-designed affinity reagents for research and diagnostics.
summary.zh: 為研究與診斷設計的 AI 親和試劑。

highlight.en: Medium Biosciences turns advances in AI and protein design into experimentally validated affinity reagents, delivering high-performance molecular tools in weeks rather than months.
highlight.zh: Medium Biosciences 將 AI 與蛋白質設計的進展轉化為經實驗驗證的親和試劑，在數週而非數月內交付高效能的分子工具。

summary.en: Business intelligence as code — build data products with SQL and markdown.
summary.zh: 程式碼即商業智慧——用 SQL 與 Markdown 打造資料產品。

highlight.en: Evidence is an open-source, code-based alternative to drag-and-drop BI tools, letting teams build polished data products using just SQL and markdown.
highlight.zh: Evidence 是拖放式 BI 工具的開源、程式碼導向替代方案，讓團隊僅用 SQL 與 Markdown 就能打造精緻的資料產品。

summary.en: A marketplace for trading gaming skins and assets without scams.
summary.zh: 可安全交易遊戲造型與資產、避免詐騙的市集。

highlight.en: GamerPay integrates with games to instantly validate trades and is the first to build a fully compliant parental-consent system, letting underage gamers trade skins legally.
highlight.zh: GamerPay 與遊戲整合以即時驗證交易，並率先建立完全合規的家長同意系統，讓未成年玩家能合法交易造型。

summary.en: A Google-level engineering productivity suite that automates merge workflows.
summary.zh: 達 Google 等級的工程生產力套件，自動化合併流程。

highlight.en: Aviator automates merge workflows and keeps builds healthy, saving engineers up to 5 hours a week; users include Slack, Square, Figma, and DoorDash.
highlight.zh: Aviator 自動化合併流程並維持建構健康，每週為工程師節省最多 5 小時；使用者包括 Slack、Square、Figma 與 DoorDash。

summary.en: A cryptocurrency robo-adviser that manages funds across broad digital-asset baskets.
summary.zh: 管理廣泛數位資產組合的加密貨幣機器人理財顧問。

highlight.en: Hedgehog manages funds in baskets covering up to 85% of crypto's market cap; it has 15k users monitoring $176m in assets and completed its SEC exit interview with a custodial product now live.
highlight.zh: Hedgehog 以涵蓋加密貨幣市值最多 85% 的資產籃管理資金；已有 1.5 萬名使用者監控 1.76 億美元資產，並完成 SEC 退出訪談，託管產品現已上線。

summary.en: A modern platform for content marketing and SEO.
summary.zh: 現代化的內容行銷與 SEO 平台。

highlight.en: Positional connects the SEO workflow end to end — from keyword research to analytics — focusing on revenue-driving actions rather than vanity metrics.
highlight.zh: Positional 將 SEO 工作流程從頭到尾串接起來——從關鍵字研究到數據分析——聚焦於帶來營收的行動，而非虛榮指標。

summary.en: A complete production-quality platform with AI-powered E2E and load testing.
summary.zh: 整合 AI 端對端與負載測試的完整生產品質平台。

highlight.en: Artillery combines Playwright-based E2E testing, scalable load testing, and synthetic production monitoring in one platform used by thousands of developer teams.
highlight.zh: Artillery 將以 Playwright 為基礎的端對端測試、可擴展的負載測試與合成生產監控整合於同一平台，已有數千個開發團隊使用。

summary.en: A community for India's 100 million financial market traders and investors.
summary.zh: 為印度 1 億金融市場交易者與投資人打造的社群。

highlight.en: FrontPage harnesses the power of community so India's growing base of traders and investors can connect, share ideas, and learn from one another.
highlight.zh: FrontPage 善用社群的力量，讓印度日益增長的交易者與投資人能彼此連結、分享想法並相互學習。

summary.en: Create and share interactive product demos in minutes.
summary.zh: 在數分鐘內製作並分享互動式產品示範。

highlight.en: Rivia.ai lets marketing and sales teams build self-guided, interactive product demos in 10 minutes that prospects can engage with — embeddable in apps, websites, emails, or ads.
highlight.zh: Rivia.ai 讓行銷與銷售團隊在 10 分鐘內製作自助式互動產品示範供潛在客戶體驗，並可嵌入應用程式、網站、電子郵件或廣告。

summary.en: Browser automation for businesses powered by AI agents.
summary.zh: 由 AI 代理驅動的企業瀏覽器自動化。

highlight.en: Sleek builds AI agents that automate key eCommerce flows for online shoppers, powering these experiences across mobile and desktop via the browser.
highlight.zh: Sleek 打造能為線上消費者自動化關鍵電商流程的 AI 代理，透過瀏覽器在行動與桌面裝置上提供這些體驗。

summary.en: Track nutrition from a single photo of any meal.
summary.zh: 只需一張餐點照片即可追蹤營養。

highlight.en: SnapCalorie lets you photograph any meal for an accurate calorie count; its team co-founded Google Lens and published a CVPR paper showing the first algorithm to beat a professional nutritionist.
highlight.zh: SnapCalorie 讓你拍下任何餐點即可獲得準確的卡路里計算；其團隊曾共同創立 Google Lens，並發表 CVPR 論文展示首個勝過專業營養師的演算法。

summary.en: A customer success co-pilot that helps teams work with customers in Slack.
summary.zh: 協助團隊在 Slack 中服務客戶的客戶成功副手。

highlight.en: Abbot watches Slack activity to ensure fast replies, summarizes conversations, tags topics, suggests next steps, and runs custom Skills triggered by topics, schedules, or webhooks.
highlight.zh: Abbot 監看 Slack 活動以確保快速回覆，並能摘要對話、標記主題、建議後續步驟，還能執行由主題、排程或 webhook 觸發的自訂 Skills。

summary.en: A CRM built for creatives.
summary.zh: 為創意工作者打造的 CRM。

highlight.en: Maroo is a CRM designed specifically for creative professionals; it was acquired by Helium Ventures.
highlight.zh: Maroo 是專為創意專業人士設計的 CRM，已被 Helium Ventures 收購。

summary.en: Close and activate your customers on WhatsApp, no code required.
summary.zh: 在 WhatsApp 上成交並啟動你的客戶，無需寫程式。

highlight.en: Hilos lets startups and SMBs run their entire business on WhatsApp without code, building apps that profile leads, automate follow-ups, and integrate with CRMs, databases, and payment providers.
highlight.zh: Hilos 讓新創與中小企業無需寫程式即可在 WhatsApp 上經營整個業務，建立可篩選名單、自動跟進並整合 CRM、資料庫與支付供應商的應用程式。

summary.en: A secure fraud prevention and authentication platform for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者打造的安全防詐與身分驗證平台。

highlight.en: Keyri ties user identities to trusted devices via mobile and browser fingerprinting to block account takeovers and bot attacks, and offers passwordless authentication using passkeys, WebAuthn, and QR codes.
highlight.zh: Keyri 透過行動與瀏覽器指紋將使用者身分綁定至受信任裝置，以阻擋帳戶盜用與機器人攻擊，並提供使用 passkey、WebAuthn 與 QR code 的無密碼身分驗證。

summary.en: We help high-growth startups go viral on autopilot.
summary.zh: 協助高成長新創自動化地走紅。

highlight.en: AlgoViral runs a startup's entire social growth loop end to end — creating, publishing, and managing organic content at scale, then turning winners into high-performing ads.
highlight.zh: AlgoViral 為新創端到端營運整個社群成長循環——大規模製作、發佈並管理自然內容，再將表現最佳者轉化為高效廣告。

summary.en: An app for B2B companies to find customer stories and advocates.
summary.zh: 協助 B2B 公司挖掘客戶故事與擁護者的應用程式。

highlight.en: Laudable surfaces happy customers and success stories hidden in existing data — call recordings, NPS, Salesforce logs — and auto-generates case study content.
highlight.zh: Laudable 從通話錄音、NPS、Salesforce 紀錄等既有資料中挖掘滿意客戶與成功故事，並自動生成案例研究內容。

summary.en: A new browser designed for founders, researchers, and content creators.
summary.zh: 為創辦人、研究者與內容創作者設計的全新瀏覽器。

highlight.en: SigmaOS rebuilds the browser from the ground up for fast, productive web work, helping users who juggle 100+ tabs and 10+ web apps stay focused and keep their context.
highlight.zh: SigmaOS 從零重新打造瀏覽器，專為快速且高產的網路工作而生，協助同時開著上百個分頁與十多個網頁應用的使用者保持專注並維持脈絡。

summary.en: Accelerate software development with WarpBuild's 10x faster CI infrastructure.
summary.zh: 以 WarpBuild 快 10 倍的 CI 基礎設施加速軟體開發。

highlight.en: WarpBuild's cloud runners for GitHub Actions deliver 30% faster, 90% cheaper CI builds, set up in 30 seconds.
highlight.zh: WarpBuild 為 GitHub Actions 提供的雲端執行器可帶來快 30%、便宜 90% 的 CI 建構，30 秒即可完成設定。

summary.en: A mobile app for CPG brands to connect to millions of stores globally.
summary.zh: 讓消費品品牌連結全球數百萬家門市的行動應用程式。

highlight.en: Milky Way AI's computer-vision mobile app lets CPG brands audit in real time how their products are displayed and priced across millions of stores, cutting audit time 10x and cost 3x.
highlight.zh: Milky Way AI 以電腦視覺驅動的行動應用程式讓消費品品牌即時稽核產品在數百萬家門市的陳列與定價，將稽核時間縮短 10 倍、成本降低 3 倍。

summary.en: Computer vision that makes the industrial workplace safer.
summary.zh: 讓工業職場更安全的電腦視覺技術。

highlight.en: Protex AI uses privacy-preserving software on existing cameras in ports, logistics, and manufacturing to proactively identify safety risks before injuries occur.
highlight.zh: Protex AI 在港口、物流與製造業的既有攝影機上運用保護隱私的軟體，於事故發生前主動辨識安全風險。

summary.en: One-hour antibiotic sensitivity testing for bacterial sepsis.
summary.zh: 針對細菌性敗血症的一小時抗生素敏感性檢測。

highlight.en: Astek's Eugris platform guides physicians to the right antibiotic for sepsis patients in one hour by detecting the oxygen consumption of bacteria.
highlight.zh: Astek 的 Eugris 平台透過偵測細菌的耗氧量，在一小時內引導醫師為敗血症病患選擇正確的抗生素。

summary.en: Bare-metal access to Brazil's Open Finance and Pix systems for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者提供巴西開放金融與 Pix 系統的底層直連存取。

highlight.en: Cumbuca is an infratech bank giving developers direct Central Bank connectivity to Pix, payment initiation, and data APIs under its license, handling compliance with no vendor lock-in.
highlight.zh: Cumbuca 是一家基礎設施銀行，在其牌照下讓開發者直接連通央行的 Pix、付款發動與資料 API，並負責合規，且無供應商鎖定。

summary.en: Building Gong.io for offline retail conversations.
summary.zh: 為線下零售對話打造的 Gong.io。

highlight.en: outloud.ai records and analyzes drive-thru ordering conversations to help restaurant operators upsell better and alerts them when items are out of stock.
highlight.zh: outloud.ai 記錄並分析得來速點餐對話，協助餐廳業者更有效地加價銷售，並在商品缺貨時發出警示。

summary.en: A TikTok for fashion where designers showcase their work and build traction.
summary.zh: 時尚版的 TikTok，讓設計師展示作品並累積關注。

highlight.en: Revery AI pairs an AI design tool that turns ideas into e-commerce-quality product images with a virtual dressing room, building a community where fashion creators showcase and grow their brands.
highlight.zh: Revery AI 結合能將構想轉為電商等級產品圖的 AI 設計工具與虛擬試衣間，打造讓時尚創作者展示並壯大品牌的社群。

summary.en: A white-label care enablement platform for healthcare companies.
summary.zh: 為醫療公司打造的白標照護賦能平台。

highlight.en: Pillar combines a SOC 2-certified, HIPAA-compliant white-label platform with a network of 1,200+ health coaches to drive patient engagement, care navigation, and chronic condition management.
highlight.zh: Pillar 結合通過 SOC 2 認證、符合 HIPAA 的白標平台與 1,200 多名健康教練網絡，推動病患參與、照護導引與慢性病管理。

summary.en: An AI career platform for healthcare workers.
summary.zh: 為醫護人員打造的 AI 職涯平台。

highlight.en: Healthcare workers use Adni's app to find jobs, store credentials, and connect with peers, while employers like Penn Medicine use its AI sourcing and screening agents to hire talent faster and cheaper.
highlight.zh: 醫護人員用 Adni 的應用程式找工作、儲存證照並與同行交流，而 Penn Medicine 等雇主則運用其 AI 人才搜尋與篩選代理更快、更省地招募人才。

summary.en: AI-powered equity research software for institutional investors.
summary.zh: 為機構投資人打造的 AI 股票研究軟體。

highlight.en: Hudson Labs (formerly Bedrock AI) uses finance-specific large language models trained on complex financial language to interpret and condense vast amounts of information for institutional investors.
highlight.zh: Hudson Labs（前身為 Bedrock AI）運用針對複雜金融語言訓練的金融專用大型語言模型，為機構投資人解讀並濃縮海量資訊。

summary.en: A platform to engineer artificial viruses as cancer therapeutics.
summary.zh: 工程化人工病毒作為癌症療法的平台。

highlight.en: Humane Genomics engineers oncolytic RNA viruses with 'two-factor authentication' for a >1000 on-target-to-off-target kill ratio; its lead program targets pediatric liver cancer with 50% tumor reduction in mouse data.
highlight.zh: Humane Genomics 工程化具「雙因素驗證」的溶瘤 RNA 病毒，使標靶與非標靶殺傷比超過 1000；其主力計畫鎖定兒童肝癌，小鼠數據顯示腫瘤縮小 50%。

summary.en: Increasing restaurant profitability through an AI operating system.
summary.zh: 透過 AI 作業系統提升餐廳獲利能力。

highlight.en: Byte Kitchen expands restaurant brands' geographic reach with minimal upfront investment by licensing their IP and rolling out their cuisine across next-generation kitchens optimized for delivery and takeout.
highlight.zh: Byte Kitchen 透過授權餐飲品牌的 IP、並在為外送與外帶優化的新世代廚房網絡中推展其菜色，以最低的前期投入擴大品牌的地理覆蓋。

summary.en: Helping companies recover lost revenue from chargebacks.
summary.zh: 協助企業從退單中追回流失的營收。

highlight.en: Protego automates chargeback management and dispute processes, providing real-time monitoring, reporting, and analytics that reveal fraudulent consumer behavior.
highlight.zh: Protego 自動化退單管理與爭議處理流程，提供即時監控、報告與分析，揭露詐欺性的消費者行為。

summary.en: Audio career advice from founders and operators, in short clips.
summary.zh: 由創辦人與營運者以短音訊片段提供的職涯建議。

highlight.en: Quest is a Q&A app where experts answer questions in short audio clips, starting with career advice from YC founders and operators at companies like Google.
highlight.zh: Quest 是一款問答應用程式，由專家以短音訊片段回答問題，從 YC 創辦人與 Google 等公司營運者的職涯建議開始。

summary.en: Reliable blockchain indexing and querying for web3 engineering teams.
summary.zh: 為 web3 工程團隊打造可靠的區塊鏈索引與查詢。

highlight.en: Satsuma lets developers take decoded data from multiple blockchains, customize it for their use cases, and access it through API endpoints, removing a major blocker to web3 adoption.
highlight.zh: Satsuma 讓開發者能擷取多條區塊鏈的解碼資料、針對使用情境客製化，並透過 API 端點存取，消除 web3 普及的一大障礙。

summary.en: Helping ML teams label the right data to improve model accuracy.
summary.zh: 協助機器學習團隊標註對的資料以提升模型準確度。

highlight.en: Since most ML teams can only afford to label 1% of their data, Lightly helps them pick the most representative 1%, significantly improving model accuracy at the same cost.
highlight.zh: 由於多數機器學習團隊只能負擔標註 1% 的資料，Lightly 協助他們挑出最具代表性的 1%，在相同成本下大幅提升模型準確度。

summary.en: Student attendance tracking software for public schools and colleges.
summary.zh: 為公立學校與大學提供的學生出勤追蹤軟體。

highlight.en: Safer Management sells attendance software that ensures public schools secure the federal funding tied to average daily attendance; it's in 75 schools and two colleges with $621K in annual recurring revenue.
highlight.zh: Safer Management 銷售出勤軟體，確保公立學校取得與平均每日出勤掛鉤的聯邦補助；目前已進駐 75 所學校與兩所大學，年經常性收入達 62.1 萬美元。

summary.en: Workflows for repetitive customer-facing tasks.
summary.zh: 處理重複性面客任務的工作流程工具。

highlight.en: Beau helps companies build, visualize, and automate customer-facing processes — collecting forms, accepting payments, requesting details, and approving steps — in one easy-to-use tool.
highlight.zh: Beau 協助企業在一個易用工具中建立、視覺化並自動化面客流程——收集表單、收款、索取細節與核准步驟。

summary.en: Engineering bacteria and plants that clean up pollution.
summary.zh: 工程化能清除污染的細菌與植物。

highlight.en: BluumBio harnesses enzymes from bacteria, algae, and plants to develop bio-based solutions that break down toxic chemicals in the environment and remove contaminants from industrial pipelines.
highlight.zh: BluumBio 善用來自細菌、藻類與植物的酵素，開發能在環境中分解有毒化學物質、並從工業管線中移除污染物的生物解決方案。

summary.en: Devices targeting the root cause of chronic pelvic pain in women.
summary.zh: 針對女性慢性骨盆疼痛根本原因的醫療裝置。

highlight.en: V-Flow Medical has developed a trio of products targeting the root cause of chronic pelvic pain, which affects over 15 million US women and costs $39 billion a year, helping them avoid opioids.
highlight.zh: V-Flow Medical 開發了三款產品，針對影響逾 1,500 萬名美國女性、每年耗費 390 億美元的慢性骨盆疼痛根本原因，協助她們避免使用鴉片類藥物。
